calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,240p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"uv run fedcourts paths --court ca11 --docket 68975767 --event evt-appeal-disposition && find data/cases/ca11/68975767 -maxdepth 8 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court ca11 --docket 68975767 --event evt-appeal-disposition\nfind data/cases/ca11/68975767 -maxdepth 10 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/ca11/68975767/events/evt-appeal-disposition/event.yaml
sed -n '1,360p' data/cases/ca11/68975767/record/snapshots/2026-07-11.json
find data/cases/ca11/68975767/record/documents -maxdepth 2 -type f -print 2>/dev/null | sort
sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/ca11/68975767/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help\nrg -n \"appeal|disposition|ca11|Eleventh\" metrics/statpack.md | head -80","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"evt-appeal-disposition|kind: appeal|appeal disposition|appeal.*granted|predicted_disposition\" docs src tests data/cases --glob '!data/cases/ca11/68975767/events/evt-appeal-disposition/outcome.json' --glob '!**/predictions/**' --glob '!**/evaluations/**' | head -160","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,220p' tests/cassettes/realistic-grant/reasoning.md
sed -n '1,120p' tests/cassettes/realistic-grant/outcome.json
sed -n '1,220p' src/fedcourtsai/events.py
rg -n "Disposition|affirm|reverse|vacat|remand|dismiss" src/fedcourtsai -g '*.py' | head -120","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",court:["ca11"],q:"Rule 4(a)(4)(B)(i) premature notice of appeal postjudgment motion jurisdiction",filed_before:"2024-09-01",num_results:5,fields:["id","caseName","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","snippet"]}); for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "image") image(c); else if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court ca9 --topic '3840 Trademark' --limit 10 --corpus-backend ranged","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git status --short --untracked-files=all -- data/cases/ca11/68975767","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)
